name: My employer in Murray is mad I filed workers comp, can they fire me?
description: No, illegal retaliation in Utah—fines up to $5K.[1]

mainEntity.name: My employer in Murray is mad I filed workers comp, can they fire me?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, illegal retaliation in Utah—fines up to $5K.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, Utah law prohibits retaliation like firing for filing a claim; fines up to $5,000 apply.** Employers can't harass or impede claims.[1][3] Key factors: Protected activity includes reporting injuries. Document retaliation. Report to Labor Commission if occurs. Job protection isn't guaranteed, but retaliation is illegal.
